headline: Has The 45% One Year Slide In CarMax (KMX) Created A Valuation Opportunity?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether CarMax, at around US$41 per share, still reflects its true worth or if the market has pushed it too far in one direction. The stock shows a mixed return profile, with a 0.9% move over the last week, a 2.0% decline over 30 days, a 4.9% gain year to date, and a 45.5% decline over the past year. Recent coverage has focused on how this longer term share price reset reshapes expectations for the used car retailer. This includes discussions about competition in...
